name: laurelinos
description: Local-first AI-native operating layer / company brain runtime for founders and small teams.

scripts.prepublishOnly: node -e "throw new Error('LaurelinOS is proprietary and must not be published without written approval.')"
scripts.test: node --test tests/*.test.mjs && python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -p '*_test.py'
scripts.check: npm test && rm -rf .laurelinos && python3 ./bin/laurelinos.py doctor && python3 ./bin/laurelinos.py init --local && python3 ./bin/laurelinos.py sources add demo ./examples/demo-data && python3 ./bin/laurelinos.py sources approve demo && python3 ./bin/laurelinos.py sources scan demo --json && python3 ./bin/laurelinos.py sources index demo --json && python3 ./bin/laurelinos.py brain search Northstar --json && python3 ./bin/laurelinos.py brief --demo && python3 ./bin/laurelinos.py open-loops --demo && python3 ./bin/laurelinos.py prepare-meeting --demo && rm -rf .laurelinos
